title: Steel Price Decline In China Is Intensifying
section_path: Steel Price Decline In China Is Intensifying
section_path_text: Steel Price Decline In China Is Intensifying
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
The pace of decline in Chinese steel prices has intensified this week, with prices through the first three days of the week down by 4.7%. Only three days have passed, but prices have already fallen by the largest amount in over two years. Overall, it remains clear that China's steel production is exceeding demand, but the intensity of the price decline is new.
